turns.content: Hi! I am Sarah and I just relocated to Vancouver from Toronto.
Welcome to Vancouver, Sarah! That is quite a move. What brought you there?
A new job — I am a graphic designer at a branding agency downtown.
That sounds exciting! Vancouver has a great creative scene.
I know! I love it already. I drove my Toyota Prius across the country to get here.
That must have been quite a road trip! How long did it take?
About five days. My golden retriever Biscuit came along for the ride.
Biscuit sounds like a great road trip companion! Does he like the new city?
